channel.title: Cheonglim Saem Korean Saju Readings
channel.description: Korean Saju and Four Pillars readings in English, adjusted for birthplace, timezone, DST, and true solar time context.

item.title: Korean Four Pillars Reading in English
item.description: Korean Four Pillars reading in English for people born anywhere in the world, with birthplace, timezone, DST, and true solar time context checked before the full PDF interpretation.

item.title: Free Korean Saju Mini Preview
item.description: Try one Korean Four Pillars clue before ordering. The full Premium PDF is optional and checks birthplace, timezone, daylight saving, and true solar time context.

item.title: Premium Korean Saju Reading for 19 USDT
item.description: The main Cheonglim Saem PDF: a full Korean Saju reading in English with real birthplace, timezone, DST, and true solar time context checked.

item.title: Korean Saju for Diaspora, Adoptees, and K-culture Readers
item.description: A Korean Saju / Four Pillars reading in English for culture, self-reflection, and global birth-record handling. This is not ancestry or identity proof.

item.title: Korean Compatibility Reading in English
item.description: A Korean Four Pillars compatibility angle for international couples, curious friends, and relationship-rhythm self-reflection.
